opinion.h1: JACKSONVILLE TERMINAL CO. v. BLACKSHEAR, 296 U.S. 627 (1935)
opinion.h2: JACKSONVILLE TERMINAL COMPANY, petitioner, v. Geneva BLACKSHEAR, as Administratrix, etc.* No. 426.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John O. Jackson, of Jacksonville, Fla., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of the State of Florida Denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 663, 56 S. Ct. 169.[ Jacksonville Terminal Co v. Blackshear 296 U.S. 627 (1935) ]
